query: INSERT INTO blocks (id, block_type, content, parent_id, position, space_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, (SELECT id FROM blocks WHERE id = ?)) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET block_type = excluded.block_type, content = excluded.content, parent_id = excluded.parent_id, position = excluded.position, space_id = (SELECT id FROM blocks WHERE id = ?)
